basic_details.job_title: IDBI Bank Specialist Officer Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 31 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Here is a quick snapshot of the IDBI Bank Specialist Officer Recruitment 2026-27 for candidates who want the key facts at a glance.

application_fee.details: The application fee varies by category and must be paid online only; it is non-refundable under any circumstances. | Payment can be made via Debit Card (RuPay/Visa/MasterCard/Maestro), Credit Card, Internet Banking, or Wallets. Bank transaction/convenience charges must be borne by the candidate.

age_limit.details: Post Minimum Age Maximum Age Date of Birth Range Deputy General Manager, Grade D 35 years 45 years Not earlier than 02.07.1981 and not later than 01.07.1991 Assistant General Manager, Grade C 28 years 40 years Not earlier than 02.07.1986 and not later than 01.07.1998 Manager, Grade B 25 years 35 years Not earlier than 02.07.1991 and not later than 01.07.2001

post_wise_qualification.essential_qualification: B.Tech/BE in IT/Electronics/Computer Science or related field, OR M.Sc./MCA/M.Tech in relevant field, OR Science Graduate with valid CISA certification. CISSP/CISM/CISA/DISA/ISO 27001 Lead Auditor/CEH/GIAC preferred.
B.Tech/B.E in Civil/Electrical Engineering or dual specialization including Civil/Electrical
Graduation in Law from a recognized university
Graduate in any discipline from a recognized university

qualification.details: Eligibility for each post depends on the specific educational qualification, age, and work experience notified against that post and grade. Candidates must satisfy all three criteria as on the cut-off date to be considered. | Note: Only full-time, permanent employee experience is considered. Experience gained through staffing/manpower agencies, contractual roles, or outsourced payroll will not be counted. Experience below 6 months in any organization is not reckoned. | The relaxation in upper age limit for SC/ST/OBC candidates is allowed on a cumulative basis with only one of the remaining categories (c to e above). There is no reservation for Ex-servicemen in the Officers' cadre.

salary_details.details: IDBI Bank offers a structured pay scale along with allowances, perquisites, and Performance Linked Variable Pay as applicable to each grade. | Selected candidates are covered under the IDBI Bank Ltd. New Pension Scheme (IBLNPS) Rules, 2011. Initial appointment for all posts is on probation for 1 year, ordinarily confirmed on completion of the probation period.

and merely meeting the eligibility criteria does not guarantee a call for the next stage.

educational qualification

and experience declared in the application form. Document Verification (DV): Verification of all declared details against original documents. Group Discussion (GD) and/or Personal Interview (PI): Shortlisted candidates are called based on qualification

IDBI Bank reserves the right to change

Document Category Documents Required
Age Proof 10th Standard Marksheet or School Leaving Certificate or Birth Certificate

Educational Qualification Marksheets and Passing Certificates for Class 10, Class 12, Graduation, and PG/Masters (all semester/year-wise or consolidated), along with Degree/Provisional Degree Certificates
Caste/Tribe/Class Certificate (SC/ST/OBC-NCL/EWS) Latest certificate in Central Government format, stamped and signed by the competent authority
Work Experience Experience Certificates from past and current employers, or Offer Letters/Relieving Letters/Salary Slips clearly showing Date of Joining and Relieving
PwBD Certificate Valid Disability Certificate with disability type, percentage, and validity as on the cut-off date
Photo Identity Any 2 of: PAN Card, Passport, Driving License, Voter's Card, Bank Passbook with photo, Aadhar/e-Aadhar
Note: Ration Card is not accepted as valid photo ID. Experience on contract basis or through staffing/manpower agencies will not be counted as relevant experience.
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply strictly through the official IDBI Bank career portal; no other mode of application is accepted.
Locate the link for Specialist Officer Recruitment 2026-27 (Advt. No. 03/2026-27)
Register using a valid personal email ID and mobile number
Fill in personal, educational, and experience details carefully
Upload scanned photograph (4.5cm x 3.5cm, 20-50 KB) and signature (140 x 60 pixels, 10-20 KB)
Upload Curriculum Vitae in PDF format, A4 size, not exceeding 500 KB
Pay the application fee/intimation charges online as applicable to your category
Click Final Submit and save the system-generated e-receipt and application printout

Important: No corrections, amendments, or resubmissions are allowed after clicking Final Submit. Candidates should use the "Save and Next" facility to verify details before final submission, as the save facility is available only three times.
important_instructions: Candidates may apply for only one notified position; multiple applications will be rejected without refund. Training, Internship, Apprenticeship, Teaching, Graduate Trainee, or Retainership experience will not be considered against any advertised role. IDBI Bank reserves the right to offer a post one grade lower than applied for, at its discretion. Candidates already employed in Government/PSU/Public Sector Banks must produce a No Objection Certificate at the time of Personal Interview. Only SC/ST candidates are eligible for reimbursement of AC II tier railway fare for attending the selection process, subject to conditions. Any dispute arising from this recruitment is subject to the sole jurisdiction of courts situated in Mumbai. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification.

content_sections.heading: IDBI Bank Specialist Officer Recruitment 2026-27: Quick Overview
content_sections.text: Here is a quick snapshot of the IDBI Bank Specialist Officer Recruitment 2026-27 for candidates who want the key facts at a glance.

content_sections.heading: IDBI Bank Specialist Officer Important Dates
content_sections.text: Candidates must complete registration and fee payment within the notified window, as late applications will not be accepted under any circumstances.

rows.event: Start Date of Online Registration & Fee Payment
Last Date of Online Registration & Fee Payment
Cut-off Date for Eligibility (Age, Qualification, Experience)

content_sections.heading: IDBI Bank Specialist Officer Vacancy Details 2026-27
content_sections.text: The 31 vacancies are spread across four functional areas and three officer grades, with Manager (Grade B) accounting for the largest share of openings. Note: The number of vacancies is provisional and may vary as per the Bank's actual requirement. IDBI Bank may also select an applicant in a lower grade than the one applied for, at its sole discretion.

content_sections.heading: IDBI Bank Specialist Officer Reservation Details
content_sections.text: Reservation for SC, ST, OBC, EWS, and PwBD categories has been provided grade-wise as per Government of India guidelines.

content_sections.heading: IDBI Bank Specialist Officer Eligibility Criteria (As on July 01, 2026)
content_sections.text: Eligibility for each post depends on the specific educational qualification, age, and work experience notified against that post and grade. Candidates must satisfy all three criteria as on the cut-off date to be considered. Note: Only full-time, permanent employee experience is considered. Experience gained through staffing/manpower agencies, contractual roles, or outsourced payroll will not be counted. Experience below 6 months in any organization is not reckoned. The relaxation in upper age limit for SC/ST/OBC candidates is allowed on a cumulative basis with only one of the remaining categories (c to e above). There is no reservation for Ex-servicemen in the Officers' cadre.

rows.educational_qualification: B.Tech/BE in IT/Electronics/Computer Science or related field, OR M.Sc./MCA/M.Tech in relevant field, OR Science Graduate with valid CISA certification. CISSP/CISM/CISA/DISA/ISO 27001 Lead Auditor/CEH/GIAC preferred.
rows.experience: Minimum 7 years as an officer in BFSI/IT/Information Security consultancy, of which 4 years in IS Audit/Cyber Security Audit/Information Security Consultancy.
Minimum 4 years as an officer in BFSI/IT/Information Security consultancy, of which 2 years in IS Audit/Cyber Security Audit/Information Security Consultancy.

rows.educational_qualification: B.Tech/B.E in Civil/Electrical Engineering or dual specialization including Civil/Electrical
rows.experience: Minimum 10 years in BFSI/Large Corporates/Infrastructure/PSU, of which 7 years in handling Civil/Electrical engineering activities including tendering and branch/office setup.
Minimum 4 years in BFSI/Large Corporates/Infrastructure/PSU, of which 2 years in relevant engineering activities.

rows.educational_qualification: Graduation in Law from a recognized university
rows.experience: Minimum 10 years, including at least 7 years as a law officer in BFSI/ARC/Government entities/Regulatory bodies, OR as a practicing Advocate with at least 7 years as a law officer in BFSI/ARC/Government entities.
Minimum 4 years, including at least 2 years as a law officer in BFSI/ARC/Government entities, OR as a practicing Advocate with at least 2 years as a law officer.

rows.educational_qualification: Graduate in any discipline from a recognized university
rows.experience: Minimum 4 years of Commissioned Service not below the rank of Captain (Army) or equivalent in Navy/Air Force, or Assistant Superintendent/Deputy Superintendent/Assistant Commandant/Deputy Commandant in Police/Paramilitary Forces. Preference for BFSI security experience. Officers with experience solely in accounts/administrative/support roles are not eligible.

rows.date_of_birth_range: Not earlier than 02.07.1981 and not later than 01.07.1991
Not earlier than 02.07.1986 and not later than 01.07.1998
Not earlier than 02.07.1991 and not later than 01.07.2001

content_sections.heading: IDBI Bank Specialist Officer Salary and Pay Scale
content_sections.text: IDBI Bank offers a structured pay scale along with allowances, perquisites, and Performance Linked Variable Pay as applicable to each grade. Selected candidates are covered under the IDBI Bank Ltd. New Pension Scheme (IBLNPS) Rules, 2011. Initial appointment for all posts is on probation for 1 year, ordinarily confirmed on completion of the probation period.

content_sections.heading: IDBI Bank Specialist Officer Application Fee
content_sections.text: The application fee varies by category and must be paid online only; it is non-refundable under any circumstances. Payment can be made via Debit Card (RuPay/Visa/MasterCard/Maestro), Credit Card, Internet Banking, or Wallets. Bank transaction/convenience charges must be borne by the candidate.

content_sections.heading: IDBI Bank Specialist Officer Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection is based on a multi-stage process, and merely meeting the eligibility criteria does not guarantee a call for the next stage. Preliminary Screening: Based on age, educational qualification, and experience declared in the application form. Document Verification (DV): Verification of all declared details against original documents. Group Discussion (GD) and/or Personal Interview (PI): Shortlisted candidates are called based on qualification, experience, and overall suitability. Pre-Recruitment Medical Test (PRMT): Final offer is subject to being declared medically fit as per the Bank's Medical Fitness Standards. IDBI Bank reserves the right to change, modify, or cancel any part of the selection process, method, or criteria at its discretion.

content_sections.heading: Documents Required for IDBI Bank Specialist Officer Selection Process
content_sections.text: Note: Ration Card is not accepted as valid photo ID. Experience on contract basis or through staffing/manpower agencies will not be counted as relevant experience.

rows.documents_required: 10th Standard Marksheet or School Leaving Certificate or Birth Certificate
Marksheets and Passing Certificates for Class 10, Class 12, Graduation, and PG/Masters (all semester/year-wise or consolidated), along with Degree/Provisional Degree Certificates
Latest certificate in Central Government format, stamped and signed by the competent authority
Experience Certificates from past and current employers, or Offer Letters/Relieving Letters/Salary Slips clearly showing Date of Joining and Relieving
Valid Disability Certificate with disability type, percentage, and validity as on the cut-off date
Any 2 of: PAN Card, Passport, Driving License, Voter's Card, Bank Passbook with photo, Aadhar/e-Aadhar

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for IDBI Bank Specialist Officer Recruitment 2026-27
content_sections.text: Candidates must apply strictly through the official IDBI Bank career portal; no other mode of application is accepted. Visit the official website: idbi.bank.in/idbi-bank-careers-current-openings.aspx Locate the link for Specialist Officer Recruitment 2026-27 (Advt. No. 03/2026-27) Register using a valid personal email ID and mobile number Fill in personal, educational, and experience details carefully Upload scanned photograph (4.5cm x 3.5cm, 20-50 KB) and signature (140 x 60 pixels, 10-20 KB) Upload Curriculum Vitae in PDF format, A4 size, not exceeding 500 KB Pay the application fee/intimation charges online as applicable to your category Click Final Submit and save the system-generated e-receipt and application printout Important: No corrections, amendments, or resubmissions are allowed after clicking Final Submit. Candidates should use the "Save and Next" facility to verify details before final submission, as the save facility is available only three times.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for IDBI Bank Specialist Officer Recruitment
content_sections.text: Candidates may apply for only one notified position; multiple applications will be rejected without refund. Training, Internship, Apprenticeship, Teaching, Graduate Trainee, or Retainership experience will not be considered against any advertised role. IDBI Bank reserves the right to offer a post one grade lower than applied for, at its discretion. Candidates already employed in Government/PSU/Public Sector Banks must produce a No Objection Certificate at the time of Personal Interview. Only SC/ST candidates are eligible for reimbursement of AC II tier railway fare for attending the selection process, subject to conditions. Any dispute arising from this recruitment is subject to the sole jurisdiction of courts situated in Mumbai. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification.

content_sections.heading: IDBI Bank Specialist Officer Recruitment 2026-27: Important Links
content_sections.text: Apply Online: Click here (Link for the online registration will be open from July 14, 2026 onwards) Official Notification PDF : Click here Official Website: Click here Join Arattai Channel: Click Here Join Telegram Channel: Click Here Join WhatsApp Channel : Click Here Sarkari Result : Click Here Download Mobile App: Click Here

faq.question: Q1. When will the online application for IDBI Bank Specialist Officer Recruitment 2026-27 start?
faq.answer: Online registration starts on July 14, 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for IDBI Bank Specialist Officer Recruitment 2026-27?
faq.answer: The last date to complete online registration and fee payment is July 26, 2026.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are there in IDBI Bank Specialist Officer Recruitment 2026-27?
faq.answer: A total of 31 vacancies have been notified across Audit-IS, Infrastructure Management, Legal, and Security Officer posts.

faq.question: Q4. What is the cut-off date for eligibility in IDBI Bank Specialist Officer Recruitment 2026-27?
faq.answer: The cut-off date for age, qualification, and experience is July 01, 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for IDBI Bank Specialist Officer Recruitment 2026-27?
faq.answer: SC/ST/PwBD candidates pay ₹250, while General, EWS, and OBC candidates pay ₹1050, including GST.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for IDBI Bank Specialist Officer posts?
faq.answer: Age limits vary by grade: 25–35 years for Manager (Grade B), 28–40 years for Assistant General Manager (Grade C), and 35–45 years for Deputy General Manager (Grade D), as on July 01, 2026.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for IDBI Bank Specialist Officer Recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes Document Verification, Group Discussion and/or Personal Interview, and a Pre-Recruitment Medical Test.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary for IDBI Bank Specialist Officer posts?
faq.answer: Approximate gross monthly emoluments in metro cities are ₹129,000 for Manager (Grade B), ₹169,000 for AGM (Grade C), and ₹204,000 for DGM (Grade D).

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates apply for more than one post in this recruitment?
faq.answer: No. Candidates are strictly advised to apply for only one notified position; multiple applications will be rejected without refund of fees.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for IDBI Bank Specialist Officer Recruitment 2026-27?
faq.answer: Candidates must apply online through the official IDBI Bank careers page at idbi.bank.in, as no other mode of application is accepted.
